extraction.one_line_summary: KUNG Stefan won the 12.7km opening time trial by 6 seconds over EVENEPOEL, gaining time in the technical uphill finale despite trailing at mid-race.
tactical_patterns: KUNG Stefan slower at 7km intermediate but gained 11+ seconds on Sheffield in technical uphill second half.
EVENEPOEL Remco 6 seconds down despite returning from COVID layoff, best among pure GC contenders present.

rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: positive: dominated technical uphill finale on home roads after trailing Sheffield at halfway, third career TdS stage win
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: 6 seconds down in first race back from COVID, still best GC contender result
rider_signals.SHEFFIELD Magnus: negative: led at 7km by 7-8 seconds over eventual winner but lost 11+ seconds in technical uphill finale
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: negative: European TT champion unable to match expected performance level on home roads
